title: Fallow Land, Frozen Laws: Rethinking Land Leasing in Kerala
description: In this video, the Centre for Public Policy Research, Kochi, presents key insights from its research on land leasing restrictions in Kerala and their impact on agricultural productivity, land use, and farmer livelihoods. Kerala’s land reforms—anchored in the Kerala Land […] The post Fallow Land, Frozen Laws: Rethinking Land Leasing in Kerala appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
